title: Zoro’s Promise Is Revealed
description: On pages 7–10, this part moves through Shells Town and the first clues about Zoro, Morgan, and Helmeppo’s abuse of power.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: so 7*47's him. hmm! i could just unite those ropes and set him free...

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: If you let him loose, he'll kill us then wreck the town!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'VE BEEN HERE FOR NINE DAYS AND I CAN'T TAKE ANYMORE.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'll make it worth your while.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'll capture someone with a big price on their head and give all of the bounty to you.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: You can trust me. I'm a man of my word.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: As soon as you untie him, he'll kill us and get away! I just know it!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: WHAT A BIG HEAD HE'S GOT!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: HEY! D-DON'T GO DOWN THERE! IT'S DANGEROUS!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Luffy! Do something! She'll be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why don't you do it your-a self?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: GET LOST! do you want to get killed!?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: I MADE THESE RICE BALLS FOR YOU! I THOUGHT YOU MIGHT NEED SOME FOOD!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: It's the first time I've ever made rice balls. I hope you like them.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: "Now beat it and take that stuff with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I DON'T WANT IT!! NOW GET OUTTA HERE!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: OR I'LL STOP YOU TO DEATH!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
